economic_notes: Dokis First Nation holds a 40% partnership interest in Okikendawt Hydro L.P. and an interest in Migisi Hydro L.P. (controlled business enterprise). Also holds investment in Ontario First Nation Sovereign Wealth L.P. Located on boundaries of Districts of Parry Sound, Sudbury and Nipissing, South-West of Lake Nipissing on the French River.
notes: Revenue figures include deferred contributions brought forward. Total revenues per statement include beginning deferred contributions of $11,424,333 making the gross figure $25,855,134, but net new revenue recognized is approximately $14,254,000 (ISC + Other + Repayable). Six inactive subsidiaries consolidated: Dokis Forestry Corporation Inc., Migisi Power Corporation, Migisi Power Authority Inc., Migisi Utility Authority Inc., Migisi Tax Authority Inc., Migisi Development Corporation. Migisi Hydro L.P. is a government business enterprise accounted for by modified equity method. Adopted PSAB section 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2022 with no impact on financial statements. Prior year figures include large ILMF settlement receivable of $26,923,951 and Due to Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust outflow of $26,000,000 which were significant non-recurring items in 2022.
